inputs.label: Column Width (b)
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional width of the concrete column.

inputs.label: Column Depth (h)
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional depth of the concrete column.

inputs.label: Concrete Compressive Strength (f'c)
inputs.businessContext: Specified compressive strength of concrete at 28 days.

inputs.label: Steel Yield Strength (fy)
inputs.businessContext: Yield strength of longitudinal reinforcing steel.

inputs.label: Total Steel Area (As)
inputs.businessContext: Total cross-sectional area of longitudinal reinforcement.

inputs.label: Strength Reduction Factor (φ)
inputs.businessContext: Strength reduction factor for tied columns (0.65 per ACI 318).
